---
title: "Kodjo Aklobessi"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: Photo_AKLOBESSI.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:kodjo.aklobessi@umontreal.ca
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/kaklobessi
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/apollinaire-kodjo-aklobessi-b4477b115/
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=LH6CiwUAAAAJ&hl=en
---

I am a third year PhD student in Economics at the **Université de Montréal**. My research lies at the intersection of Family Macroeconomics, Labor Economics, and Applied Microeconometrics.

Prior to my PhD, I worked with international institutions including the World Bank, AFRISTAT, and INSEED on household surveys, poverty measurement, and social protection targeting in developing countries.
